verdict: Non-authoritative: the workflow did not complete through the canonical front door because durable submission failed before any run_id was created.
agents_exercised: Downstream agent stages were exercised only as a continuation after the blocked run, not as part of a durable workflow run.
information_handoff_proven: The file handoff path was exercised and produced a continuation artifact, but the handoff was not durably proven inside a real workflow run.
deterministic_tooling_proven: Validate, preview, workflow discover, and DB stats/query tooling were exercised, but end-to-end deterministic workflow completion was not proven.
search_exercised: Yes: workflow discover returned module/class paths and bug stats were queried from the workflow tools surface.
db_action_exercised: Yes: a DB-backed bug stats action executed, but the workflow run itself failed before durable database submission.
cqrs_assessment: CQRS separation was partially demonstrated: read/search and stats queries worked, while write-side authority failed before submission; BUG-AE2B9669 tracks the regression.
trust_boundary: Trust stops at the blocked workflow boundary: validate and preview are evidence, but no run_id means no authoritative durable run; the regression is tracked by BUG-AE2B9669.
